headline: Assessing D.R. Horton (DHI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum Cools
summary: Why D.R. Horton Is On Investors’ Radar Today D.R. Horton (DHI) is drawing attention after a period of mixed share performance, with a 1 day gain alongside declines over the past week, month, and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess the homebuilder’s profile.
